shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "pwd && rg --files -g '"'!*node_modules*'"' | head -80 && rg -n \"timeZone|selectsMultiple|isSelected|selectedDates|startDate|endDate\" src test tests 2>/dev/null | head -240"

/bin/bash -lc 'rg -n "timeZone|formatInTimeZone|toZonedTime|fromZonedTime|handleSelect|handleDayClick|isSelected|selectedDates" src/index.tsx src/calendar.tsx src/month.tsx src/day.tsx src/year.tsx src/date_utils.ts'
/bin/bash -lc 'cat package.json; rg -n "function isSameDay|export.*isSameDay|const isSameDay|export function getDate|export function getMonth|export function getYear|formatDate" src/date_utils.ts'
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '340,410p' src/calendar.tsx; sed -n '420,470p' src/day.tsx; sed -n '250,290p' src/month.tsx; sed -n '400,455p' src/month.tsx; sed -n '820,855p' src/month.tsx"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '730,770p' src/date_utils.ts; sed -n '400,465p' src/date_utils.ts; rg -n \"selected=|selectedDates=|startDate=|endDate=|preSelection=\" src/calendar.tsx src/month.tsx"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '170,330p' src/calendar.tsx; sed -n '430,530p' src/month.tsx; sed -n '1470,1545p' src/date_utils.ts; sed -n '760,830p' src/date_utils.ts; sed -n '1,90p' src/index.tsx"
/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"function getLocaleObject|getLocaleObject =|function getDefaultLocale\" src/date_utils.ts | head -20; sed -n '280,380p' src/date_utils.ts"
